metadata.title: Rosarito Real Estate
metadata.description: Homes for sale in Rosarito, Mexico — beachfront condos, ocean-view homes, and surf-inspired developments 30 minutes from San Diego. Every listing title-searched and developer-verified.
metadata.ogDescription: Certified developments in Rosarito. Every listing title-searched and developer-verified, 30 minutes from San Diego.

hero.description: Browse Rosarito real estate — beachfront condos, ocean-view homes & surf-inspired developments 30 min from San Diego. Verified builders, bilingual support.
hero.imageAlt: Modern luxury beach home in Rosarito

features.title: Vetted Developers, Zero Guesswork
features.body: Every Rosarito development listed here has passed our due diligence process — judicial records, corporate history, and project documentation reviewed. We help you identify developers with a proven track record of delivering on their promises.

features.title: 30 Minutes from San Diego, Right on the Beach
features.body: Rosarito is the closest beach town to San Diego — close enough for a weekend drive, compelling enough to own. Our buyers enjoy Pacific Ocean frontage at a fraction of California prices, with the convenience of San Diego's airport, hospitals, and shopping just across the border.

features.title: Bilingual Guidance from Search to Close
features.body: We guide American buyers through every step of a Rosarito real estate purchase — from selecting the right development to setting up a fideicomiso and closing with confidence. Bilingual support in English and Spanish throughout the entire process.

seoBlock.heading: Properties for sale in Rosarito
seoBlock.body: Rosarito real estate is one of the best-kept secrets on the Pacific coast — and word is spreading fast among American buyers. Just 30 minutes south of San Diego, Rosarito Beach offers a thriving expat community, a booming vacation rental market, and some of the most affordable oceanfront properties in North America. From surf-inspired condos steps from the beach to luxury beachfront towers with resort amenities, there's a style of Rosarito real estate for every buyer. Whether you're looking for a weekend getaway, a retirement home, or a cash-flowing rental investment, Rosarito delivers Pacific coast living at a price that simply doesn't exist north of the border. Explore our curated selection of verified Rosarito developments below — each one vetted for legal clarity and developer integrity so you can buy with confidence.
seoBlock.imageAlt: Pacific coastline in Rosarito, Baja California
